name: 18"x18" Luxe Square Velvet Pleated Decorative Pillow Light Teal - Threshold™: Indoor Geometric Design, Polyester Velour
description:
Infuse a hint of luxury and modern style into your seating arrangement or bedding with this Luxe Square Velvet Pleated Decorative Pillow from Threshold™. This light teal throw pillow is adorned with a chic pleated design for an eye-catching look. Featuring a luxe velour exterior and padded interior, this 18-inch square throw pillow adds the right amount of comfort and style to your space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
